name: Partition API (auto-detection + routing)
applicability: T28 extraction layer needs exactly this pattern — auto-detect source type, route to type-specific extractor, return unified element types

name: FileType enum as self-describing registry
applicability: Each FileType declares its partitioner, deps, extras, MIME types, and extensions. T28 could use this pattern for source type registration

name: Element type hierarchy with metadata
applicability: Dataclass-based element types with coordinates, data source metadata, permissions. T28 analysis layer needs similar typed output structure

name: Strategy pattern (AUTO/FAST/OCR_ONLY/HI_RES)
applicability: Quality vs speed tradeoff with graceful fallback. T28 could offer quick/standard/deep extraction modes

name: Chunking with table isolation
applicability: Title-based semantic chunking, table isolation, token counting. Relevant for T28 analysis layer but lower priority than extraction

name: Performance benchmarking infrastructure
applicability: S3-backed benchmark results with architecture/instance/hash tagging. Model for T28 extraction quality benchmarking

name: Text cleaning pipeline
applicability: Post-extraction cleaning: bullets, ligatures, whitespace, non-ASCII. T28 extraction layer needs similar normalization

name: Document ontology V2
applicability: Pydantic-based HTML intermediate representation. Interesting architectural decision but actively being redesigned — learn from both the pattern and the acknowledged over-engineering

name: Metrics evaluation framework
applicability: Element type accuracy, table extraction quality, text extraction accuracy metrics. Model for T28 extraction quality measurement

name: unstructured-ingest (connectors + embedding + pipeline)
applicability: 40+ source connectors. Architectural boundary: unstructured=extraction, ingest=pipeline. T28 connector layer reference

name: unstructured-inference (ML models for document analysis)
applicability: Document layout detection, table recognition. T28 may need similar ML integration for complex documents

name: Golden file snapshot testing
applicability: 40+ connector types tested via expected markdown output snapshots. Pattern for T28 extraction regression testing

name: Formula markdown export
applicability: Auto/display_math/plain LaTeX rendering modes. Specialized for academic docs — niche for T28

name: Graceful dependency fallback
applicability: Check if dep is installed, fallback to next-best strategy. T28 needs this for optional heavy deps (Whisper, OCR, etc.)
